messages.msg_string: <CLGR>Taking actions in the field uses LP.<CLNR> When you touch an enemy while at low LP, you will have lower stats.
<CLGR>Using items in the field consumes use count.<CLNR> Once the count reaches 0, you cannot use the item anymore.
<CLGR>LP and item count will be restored when you return to the atelier.<CLNR> You should return when things get tough.
